narrative:
Springfield Twp. township has 26,955 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.2 percentage points.
